Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0015",
  "title": "海外移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 18,
  "page_range": "18-19"
}

Section text:
海外移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜
全新原创的大制作在2025几乎缺席 IP是对冲市场不确定性的核心资产
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
2025年海外移动游戏新品收入TOP榜
回顾2024年的新品榜单，涌现了多款大制作、高期待、全新原创的重磅大作，如《绝区零》《鸣潮》《恋与深空》等。而2025年的新品头部阵营呈现出明显的“收敛”态势：
《奔奔王国》《可狱不可囚》《吸血鬼》三款产品虽为原创IP，但他们的成功皆源于厂商对自身爆款产品框架的精准复用，其核心是成熟商业模型的优化与高效营销，而非玩法范
式的颠覆；除此之外，其他上榜产品清一色是经典游戏IP的改编或重启。在用户获取成本高昂、市场注意力被长线运营产品牢牢固化的环境下，“IP情怀”与“已验证玩法模型的
微创新”成为对冲市场不确定性、保障基础回报的最重要资产。新品不再被要求去凭空创造一个新世界，而是被期望能更安全、更高效地承接某个现有IP的粉丝情感，或满足某个
已被验证的用户需求。
奔奔王国
全年流水：42.26亿元
点点互动
1
SD钢弹 G世代 永恒（日服）
全年流水：20.62亿元

message.content:
**Topics:** 2025 overseas mobile game new release revenue rankings, market development trends, IP utilization vs. original IP creation, commercial framework reuse, user acquisition cost impact, long-term operation market dynamics.
**Entities:** Top 16 revenue-generating new games (《奔奔王国》《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》《弓箭传说2》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》《枫之谷：放置冒险记》《Disney Solitaire》《I9》《洛奇M》《吸血鬼》《RF ONLINE NEXT》《可狱不可囚》《暗影诗章：凌越世界》《杖剑传说》《赛马娘》《DC: Dark Legion》); publishers/developers (点点互动, 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, SuperPlay, 乐牛游戏, 益世界, CyGames, 雷霆游戏, FunPlus); data provider (点点数据).
**Dates:** 2024 (baseline comparison year), 2025 (primary analysis period), 2026 (report copyright year).
**Claims/Insights:** 2025 lacks major original AAA releases; top revenue is dominated by classic IP adaptations/reboots and titles that precisely reuse proven commercial frameworks; "IP nostalgia" and "micro-innovations on validated models" are core assets to hedge against market uncertainty and high user acquisition costs; new releases are expected to efficiently capture existing IP fanbases rather than pioneer new gameplay paradigms.
**Metrics:** Annual revenue (流水) in RMB (亿元) for each of the top 16 ranked games, ranging from 42.26亿元 (#1) to 6.04亿元 (#16).
**Evidence/Format:** Ranked list/table of top-grossing overseas mobile game new releases for 2025, detailing rank, title, annual revenue, and publisher; analytical commentary on market convergence; sourced from 点点数据 proprietary research. No procedural steps or formal definitions are included.
